title: Al-Tadhkirah bi-Ahwal al-Mawta wa-Amr al-Akhirah
author: Imam Abu Abdillah Al-Qurtubi (d. 671 AH)
description: Masterpiece classical compendium detailing the soul's journey, death, minor signs, major signs, and the Resurrection.

title: Al-Bidayah wan-Nihayah (Kitab al-Fitan wal-Malahim)
author: Hafiz Ibn Kathir (d. 774 AH)
description: Comprehensive historical and eschatological work covering creation to the end of time.

title: Ashrat as-Sa'ah (Signs of the Hour)
author: Dr. Yusuf ibn Abdallah al-Wabil
description: Widely acclaimed contemporary academic study scrutinizing minor and major signs by authentic Hadith standards.
